name: Kolacky's That Melt in Your Mouth
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together cream cheese, flour, and butter until well blended. (batter will be stiff, but soft).
2. Refrigerate for several hours to firm up enough to roll dough.
3. Roll out, and cut into small square shapes.
4. Put a dollop of Kolacky, jam, or nut filling in the center of each shape.
5. Fold two opposite corners over the center, and pinch together.
6. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet, about 1 1/2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 15 minutes in a 350 degree oven.
8. Remove from pan, and allow to cool completely.
9. Dust with powdered sugar.
